Za prijatelje an─Сeo ─Нuvar dok je za ove druge bio no─Зna mora, a gnev i ja─Нinu njegove pesnice neprijatelji su odli─Нno pamtili. ┼╜ivotni put Ljubomira Maga┼бa i dru┼╛ine koju je okupio oko sebe, mo┼╛e se porediti sa scenama holivudskog filma. Od bezbri┼╛nih de─Нaka do ljudi sa poternica, od vila i luksuznih automobila do hladnih zatvorskih zidina, preko zlata i para do kov─Нega. Sazna─Зemo na koje sve skrivene i javne na─Нine je njegova ekipa operisala krimi krugovima i videti rekonstrukcije najbitnijih doga─Сaja iz njegovog ┼╛ivota. ─Мu─Зemo i svedo─Нanstva onih koji su ga poznavali, i sve to u stilu najuzbudljivijih dokumentaristi─Нkih akcionih filmova.

snippet.title: IMPRESIVNO sa RR - BAKA PRASE : TERETE ME JER SAM MNOGO JAKA GLAVA!
snippet.description:
Od 16. marta, svakog utorka na mom yt kanalu u 19h gledacete novu epizodu IMPRESIVNO sa Ruzom Rupic. Ugosticu mnoge javne licnosti iz raznih sfera javnog zivota koje cete upoznati u potpuno drugacijem svetlu. Pricacemo o njihovim karijerama, pocecima, sta im je bilo najteze, a sta najlakse u njihovom putu i pevacemo! Pomoc cu imati od mog producenta Pavla Radulovica. Danas mi je u gostima Bogdan Ilic, poznatiji kao, Baka Prase! Kako je poceo da snima, kakve probleme donosi popularnost, o dramama i hapsenju, pricace sa mnom u danasnjoj epizodi!
Nadam se da ce vam se dopasti celokupan projekat, a mi se vidimo svakog utorka od 19h.

snippet.title: BOLJE OD ┼аTRUDLE - ─Мarobna posna pita sa makom, orasima i dzemom koju morate probati
snippet.description:
Verujte mi da joj naziv nije za dzabe "─МAROBNA PITA", toliko je ukusna da je meni bolja od ┼бtrudle a ┼бtrudlu obo┼╛avam. Kombinacija maka, dzema i oraha u jednom a pritom je jo┼б i posna. Sigurna sam u to da kada jednom budete napravili ovaj kola─Н, recept ide u omiljene i stalno ─Зete ga praviti pa ─Нak i kada nije post. Tako fino, ukusno i meko testo bez jaja i mleka. Ja sam koristila dzem od ┼бljiva koji se slo┼╛io u ovoj kombinaciji savr┼бeno. snippet.title: MAJKE & SNAJKE - kulinarski ┼бou - epizoda 1 - 22.03.2021.
snippet.description:
Iako su tradicionalno svekrve i snaje rivali u borbi za srce sina i mu┼╛a, one ─Зe se u novom kulinarskom takmi─Нenju zajedno boriti za porodi─Нnu vikendicu i druge vredne nagrade. Svake nedelje na Kurir televiziji nas o─Нekuje 5 svekrva sa svojim kuvarskim iskustvom, 5 snaja u ┼╛elji da se doka┼╛u i 5 mlado┼╛enja koji ─Зe odlu─Нivati o tome ko pobe─Сuje!

Voditelji emisije Svetlana Seka Aleksi─З i poznati beogradski kuvar Radomir Ra┼бa Vla─Нi─З vodi─Зe publiku kroz uzbudljivo kulinarsko putovanje, gde ─Зe ─Нuvene rivalke morati da sara─Сuju u borbi za nagradni fond od 4,3 miliona dinara!

Kurir televiziju mo┼╛ete pratiti kod slede─Зih provajdera: mts Iris tv, kanal 108, Supernova m:sat i Orion telekom, kanal 8, Arena cloud, Po┼бta Net, kanal 109 i Sat-trakt na poziciji 12.

snippet.title: Putin odgovorio Bajdenu: Amerika ─Зe morati na ovo da ra─Нuna
snippet.description:
Predsednik Rusije Vladimir Putin je, reagujuc╠Бi na izjavu ameri─Нkog predsednika D┼╛oa Bajdena, ameri─Нkom lideru po┼╛eleo zdravlje. тАЮ┼аto se ti─Нe izjave mog ameri─Нkog kolege, mi se zaista, kako je rekao, znamo li─Нno. ┼аta bih mu odgovorio? Rekao bih mu: Neka ste ┼╛ivi i zdravi! ┼╜elim mu dobro zdravljeтАЬ, rekao je Putin.

Prethodno je Bajden u intervjuu za тАЮEj-Bi-Si njuzтАЬ rekao da svog ruskog kolegu smatra тАЮubicomтАЬ. Bajden je tokom intervjua istakao da тАЮpoznajeтАЬ Vladimira Putina i da ruski predsednik тАЮpoznajeтАЬ njega. Na pitanje novinara da razjasni da li Bajden smatra Putina ubicom, ameri─Нki predsednik je odgovorio: тАЮMhm, smatramтАЬ.

Za sve najva┼╛nije vesti, komentare i analize posetite na┼б sajt тЦ║ https://rs.sputniknews.com/

U moru informacija treba izabrati pravu.

snippet.title: INTERVJU: Milorad Tomi─З - Lo┼бe je pro┼бao svako ko nije ─Зutao i trpeo Velju Nevolju! (24.3.2021)
snippet.description:

Kao mladi─З koji se bavio sportom po─Нeo je da radi na ulazima klubova i tako je upoznao mnoge, gotovo sve, poznate ┼╛estoke momke. To ga je dovodilo u te┼бke, a nekada i po ┼╛ivot opasne situacije. Ipak, tvrdi da ga nikada nije zanimalo ko je ko od tih ljudi, ve─З samo da li naru┼бavaju red u objektu. I momci kao ┼бto su Arkan, Zlatko Bagari─З, Mihajlo Divac i ostali nailazili su na otpor kada bi se pona┼бali neprikladno. Osim u klubovima, To┼бa je jedno vreme bio telohranitelj Vojislava ┼аe┼бelja i iz tog vremena nosi veliki broj anegdota i uspomena. snippet.title: Stuck at sea: Cargo ship wedged in Suez Canal causes traffic jam
snippet.description:
Tug boats and a digger are struggling to free a mega cargo ship, blocking one of the world's busiest shipping pathways.

Dozens of ships are stuck because a container ship almost half a kilometre long is wedged across the waterway.

snippet.title: Biden seems confused at times during first official press conference | New York Post
snippet.description:
President Biden appeared to repeatedly lose his train of thought early on in his first press conference as commander-in-chief Thursday, asking reporters if they wanted him to go into detail in his answers, forgetting questions and relying heavily on cue cards from a binder he brought along.

The president took ten questions at the 62 minute presser, repeatedly consulting his binder before calling on the next reporter.

The three-ring binder also held the opening remarks he delivered at the start of the briefing, as well as notes on topics of major concern he was likely to be asked about.

The first awkward moment occurred while the president was answering a question on the crisis at the southern border from PBS journalist Yamiche Alcindor.

#JoeBiden #PressConference

snippet.title: Pravi─Зete ih stalno! Miri┼бu do kom┼бija. Banana keksi─Зi za post na vodi, tako mekani i ukusni.
snippet.description:
HIT keksi─Зi kod mene u ku─Зi. Uku─Зani stalno tra┼╛e da im pravim. Mogu da stoje par dana, u kutiji kao i svi drugi keksi. U┼╛ivajte!
#posnireceptinavodi #posnikolaci #banane
bez ulja
bez jaja bez mleka
sa bananama
serpica recepti

Recept na blogu:
http://www.serpica.net/2021/03/banana-keksici-post-na-vodi.html

Sastojci:
- 300 gr. bra┼бna
- 2 banane
- 3 ka┼бike d┼╛ema
- 100 gr. ┼бe─Зera u prahu
- vanila
- limunova korica
- prstohvat soli
- 10 gr. pra┼бka za pecivo

Za premaz:
- 1 ka┼бika d┼╛ema
- 2 ka┼бike vode

*200 stepeni oko 20 minuta

 ENG:
Ingredients:
- 300 gr. flour
- 2 bananas
- 3 tablespoons of jam
- 100 gr. powdered sugar
- vanilla
- lemon zest
- pinch of salt
- 10 gr. baking powder

For coating:
- 1 tablespoon of jam
- 2 tablespoons of water

* 200 degrees for about 20 minutes

snippet.title: Karde┼Яlerim 6. B├╢l├╝m
snippet.description:
6.B├╢l├╝m ├Цzeti: 
тАЬSizin servetinizde bizim g├╢zya┼Я─▒m─▒z var!тАЭ
MelisaтАЩn─▒n itiraf─▒ KadirтАЩi b├╝y├╝k a├зmaza sokar. MelisaтАЩn─▒n KadirтАЩe haz─▒rlad─▒─Я─▒ s├╝rpriz, KadirтАЩi ├ЦmerтАЩe kar┼Я─▒ zor duruma d├╝┼Я├╝r├╝r.  Karde┼Яlerin ya┼Яad─▒─Я─▒ ya┼Яam m├╝cadelesi kar┼Я─▒s─▒nda ┼Юeng├╝lтАЩ├╝n merhametsizli─Яi OrhanтАЩ─▒ iyice ├зileden ├з─▒kar─▒r. SuzanтАЩdan hi├з beklemedi─Яi bir ┼Яey ├╢─Яrenen Akif, b├╝y├╝k panik ya┼Яar ve durumu idare etmekte zorlan─▒r. SuzanтАЩ─▒ oyalamaya ├зal─▒┼Я─▒rken i┼Яler sarpa sarar ve Suzan art─▒k gemileri yakmaya karar verir. Akif ve Nebahat kar┼Я─▒ kar┼Я─▒ya gelirler. Nebahat, KadirтАЩi ve karde┼Яlerini kullanarak ├╢yle bir hamle yapar ki b├╝t├╝n ger├зekler g├╝n y├╝z├╝ne ├з─▒kmaz ├╝zeredir.

Karde┼Яlerim kanal─▒na abone olmak i├зin; https://bit.ly/3oKfCa7

Tek dertleri hayat m├╝cadelesi olan d├╢rt karde┼Яin i├з burkan, sevgi dolu hik├вyesiтАж 

Ba┼Яrollerini Celil Nal├зakan, Halit ├Цzg├╝r Sar─▒, C├╝neyt Mete, Fadik Sevin Atasoy, Ahu Ya─Яtu ve Simge Sel├зukтАЩun payla┼Яt─▒─Я─▒ Karde┼Яlerim, herkese ve her ┼Яeye ra─Яmen kopmayan, d├╝┼Яt├╝k├зe birbirine tutunup yeniden aya─Яa kalkan gen├зlerin umut dolu ├╢yk├╝s├╝n├╝ ekrana getiriyor.

snippet.title: Dua Lipa - Levitating ft. DaBaby / Don't Start Now (Live at the GRAMMYs 2021)
snippet.description:
Dua Lipa - Levitating ft. @DaBaby / Don't Start Now (Live at the GRAMMYs 2021)

Get the album Future Nostalgia : https://dualipa.co/futurenostalgiaтАЛтАЛ

Subscribe to the Dua Lipa channel for all the best and latest official music videos, behind the scenes and live performances. 
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC-J-тАЛтАЛ...

https://www.youtube.com/playlist?listтАЛтАЛ...

Listen to more from the album 'Future Nostalgia' :
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?listтАЛтАЛ...

Follow Dua Lipa:
Instagram:  https://dualipa.co/instagramтАЛтАЛ
Facebook: http://dualipa.co/facebookтАЛтАЛ
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@dualipaofficialтАЛтАЛ
Twitter: http://dualipa.co/twitterтАЛтАЛ
YouTube: https://dualipa.co/youtubeтАЛтАЛ

About Dua Lipa:
Born and raised in London to Kosovar-Albanian parents Dua Lipa signed to Warner Records in 2015, releasing her self titled debut in 2017 which featured the hit singles, 'Be The One', 'IDGAF', 'Hotter Than Hell' & her first UK #1 hit 'New Rules'. 

Critical success soon followed as Dua Lipa picked up Brit Awards for 'Best Female Solo Artist' and 'Best British Breakthrough Act' as well as Grammy Awards for 'Best New Artist' and 'Best Dance Recording' for the track 'Electricity' in collaboration with Silk City.

Her second internationally acclaimed studio album 'Future Nostalgia' was released in 2020 and included the hit singles 'Don't Start Now, 'Break My Heart', 'Hallucinate' and 'Levitating', with the remix album 'Club Future Nostalgia' following shortly after featuring guest appearances from 'Blackpink', 'Missy Elliott', 'Madonna' and 'Gwen Stefani'.

#DuaLipaтАЛ #FutureNostalgiaтАЛ #Grammys

snippet.title: Joe Biden stumbles on steps of Air Force One
snippet.description:
The US president stumbled while boarding Air Force One on his way to visit to Atlanta, Georgia, to meet with Asian American community leaders. Biden tripped on the steps up to the plane, before recovering and carrying on unaided, turning to salute at the top. The 78-year-old fractured his right foot in November 2020 while playing with his dog Major

snippet.title: Sta Bi Se Desilo Kad Bi Svi Prdnuli U isto Vreme ?
snippet.description:
Ko ne lajkuje video nije dobar covek ЁЯШБ

Svi smo nekad u zivotu prdnuli, nekad pustimo one stidljive gasove koje niko ne primeti, nekad one sto smrde, nekad one glasne, a nekad uz neke od njih ide i iznenadjenje. Ali sta bi se desilo kad bi u isto vreme, svi ljudi na planeti, bez imalo stida, prdnuli. Da li bi to uticalo na kvalitet vazduha ? Koliko bi se osecalo ? I sta bi jedna sibica mogla da uradi, hajmo da saznamo.

Podrzite nas na Patreonu: https://bit.ly/2DY7fn3
Mail za Saradnju/Business email: BojanZlatarevic@gmail.com

snippet.title: Emanet 145. B├╢l├╝m | Legacy Episode 145
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman K─▒r─▒ml─▒ is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his fatherтАЩs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephewтАж Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncleтАЩs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the K─▒r─▒ml─▒ family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the K─▒r─▒ml─▒ mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#SehYam

snippet.title: Lamborghini Urus v BMW X6M - DRAG RACE
snippet.description:
Head to http://bit.ly/-Spring-Event to check out a load of all-new carwow Spring Deals! Be quick though - theyтАЩre only there until March 31st! 
.............................................................

Check out Yiannimize - http://youtube.com/yiannimize

ItтАЩs Saturday morning, so you know what time it isтАж Time for another Mat vs Yianni showdown!! 

WeтАЩve got a BMW X6M Competition going up against a Lamborghini Urus (no prizes for guessing whoтАЩs in which car)! These two SUV heavyweights are going head-to-head over the quarter-mile, and when looking at stats alone, you might think itтАЩll be an easy win for the Urus! 

Under the LamboтАЩs bonnet, youтАЩll find a 4-litre twin-turbo V8 which can deliver 650hp and 850Nm. As for the BMW, it may pack a 4.4-litre twin-turbo V8, but it only puts down 625hp & 750Nm! But thatтАЩs not allтАж The Urus is also 200kg lighter than the X6M! 

Now, of course, we know the BMW has one trick up its sleeve - an EPIC launch system! The question is, will it be enough to snatch the win on this wet track? ThereтАЩs only one way to find outтАж LETтАЩS RACE!

snippet.title: Emanet 144. B├╢l├╝m | Legacy Episode 144
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman K─▒r─▒ml─▒ is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his fatherтАЩs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephewтАж Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncleтАЩs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the K─▒r─▒ml─▒ family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the K─▒r─▒ml─▒ mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#SehYam

snippet.title: CBC News: The National | Meghan and HarryтАЩs Oprah interview; Vaccine optimism | March 7, 2021
snippet.description:
Prince Harry and Meghan sit down with Oprah for a revealing interview about leaving their roles as senior royals. The reasons to be optimistic about the vaccine rollout and the road ahead. Plus, the officer charged with killing George Floyd goes on trial. 

#HarryandMeghan
#COVID19
#GeorgeFloyd

00:00 The National for March 7, 2021
01:06 Harry and Meghan's Oprah interview
06:32 Multiple donors for same WE Charity project
09:28 Vaccines wonтАЩt be end of masks, distancing,
11:36 Canada's COVID-19 vaccine rollout 
12:14 Ontario pharmacies vaccine pilot project 
14:19 Easing COVID-19 restrictions 
14:41 Rally for return of youth sports in Quebec 
16:51 Questions about DHL 'hidden fees'
19:16 Violence continue to escalate in Myanmar
19:40 Pope preaches peace during Iraq visit 
22:55 George Floyd murder trial

snippet.title: Emanet 143. B├╢l├╝m | Legacy Episode 143
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman K─▒r─▒ml─▒ is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his fatherтАЩs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephewтАж Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncleтАЩs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the K─▒r─▒ml─▒ family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the K─▒r─▒ml─▒ mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#SehYam
#LimonA─Яac─▒

snippet.title: MEDICO - Mamma Mia (prod. by EnelBeatz)
snippet.description:
INSTAGRAM PROFILI:
Medico : https://www.instagram.com/whoismedico/

Music: Medico
Text: Medico
Arrangement: EnelBeatz, Arpino Sachi
Back vocal: Ma┼бa Sitarica
Mix & Master: Arpino Sachi


Video production: Vedad Mandra | xvedmanx
Directed by: Medico, Vedad Mandra
Script: Vedad Mandra, Medico
Camera: Vedad Mandra
CC VFX Post: Vedad Mandra
Costume: Emina Tsili

TEXT

bridge:
o mama mia mama
ko zmija zlu tom prija
uvijek zijan karma
sve vrti se sve dharma 
mama mia

ref.
i ja toga svjestan sam necastan cin mi je
jastuk na nju mirise polijem viskijem x2


vers1
moje sve htjele bi bit
 jer na meni samo je lagerfeld karl e 
zelja joj htjela benz
 nije ni bitno ko sjedi sa strane

moli da voli brzo da boli
moli za gole sate
prolij pa dolij 
glumi mi dolly dobro ta zna sta radi

meni ti nisi stipsa
jasno vidno je da tvoj tip sam
svaki drugi il treci ti kiksa
sto bas ja da sam tvoj schicksal

takvih meni puna je lista
sklonim te ko potezom kista
u minuti raste mi ista
samo za noc dobra za vise nista

bridge:
o mama mia mama
ko zmija zlu tom prija
uvijek zijan karma
sve vrati se sve dharma 
mama mia

 ref.
i ja toga svjestan sam necastan cin mi je
jastuk na nju mirise polijem viskijem x3


vers 2.
da li mislis na mene ko prije
prisjetis se probije ko noz
navijas ti za mene i lijek
tvoj sam jedini ja antidot

znas ti moje namjere ne nisu namjerne
ali vuce me na zlo
velike su razmjere izmedju zavjere
razlika je nebo tlo

meni ti nisi stipsa
jasno vidno je da tvoj tip sam
svaki drugil treci ti kiksa
sto bas ja da sam tvoj schicksal
takvih meni puna je lista
sklonim te ko potezom kista
u minuti raste mi ista
samo za noc dobra za vise nista

bridge:
refx2

snippet.title: Meghan, Duchess of Sussex, opens up about her family
snippet.description:
For the first time Meghan, Duchess of Sussex, publicly discusses her father Thomas Markle and her half-sister's forthcoming tell-all book in this previously unaired clip from her and Prince Harry's sit-down with Oprah Winfrey. Watch Oprah's full primetime special with Meghan and Prince Harry here: https://bit.ly/3t24kAK

Subscribe to the "CBS This Morning" YouTube channel: https://bit.ly/3ceNNCX
Watch more "CBS This Morning": http://bit.ly/1T88yAR
Like "CBS This Morning" on Facebook: https://on.fb.me/1LhtdvI
Follow "CBS This Morning" on Instagram: https://bit.ly/1Q7NGnY
Follow "CBS This Morning" on Twitter: https://bit.ly/1Xj5W3p
Follow CBS News on Twitter: https://bit.ly/3bdNXek

Get the latest news and best in original reporting from CBS News delivered to your inbox. Sign up for newsletters: https://cbsn.ws/1RqHw7T

Get your news on the go! Download CBS News mobile apps for Android and iOS: https://cbsn.ws/1Xb1WC8

Get new episodes of shows you love across devices the next day, stream local news live, and watch full seasons of CBS fan favorites and originals anytime, anywhere with Paramount+. Sign up here: https://bit.ly/309gCe2

---
Each weekday morning, "CBS This Morning" co-hosts Gayle King, Anthony Mason and Tony Dokoupil deliver two hours of original reporting, breaking news and top-level newsmaker interviews in an engaging and informative format that challenges the norm in network morning news programs. The broadcast has earned a prestigious Peabody Award, a Polk Award, four News & Documentary Emmys, three Daytime Emmys and the 2017 Edward R. Murrow Award for Best Newscast. The broadcast was also honored with an Alfred I. duPont-Columbia Award as part of CBS News division-wide coverage of the shootings at Sandy Hook Elementary School in Newtown, Connecticut. Check local listings for "CBS This Morning" broadcast times.
